deals.title: 5-course menu for under 30 at €130 instead of €166
deals.description: From July to August 2026, on Tuesdays, Wednesdays, and Thursdays, under 30s get a 5-course menu for €130 at Restaurant APRON, 1030 Wien, with code "NOT30YET".

evidence.aiReason: Concrete discount offer with date range, weekday schedule, and Vienna location.
